songs.title: Outbound
feed: “Outbound” by After spends a 2nd week at #1 in the Personal Hot 100.

“Outbound” by After is the #1 most airplayed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 10 airplay units.
“Outbound” by After is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 539,196 total units.
